raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 3061 addresses concerns about the lack of required reporting on autonomous vehicle collisions, accidents, and malfunctions.",
    "The bill enhances safety and transparency as autonomous vehicle companies prepare to deploy their services statewide.",
    "The DMV has not updated its regulations on autonomous vehicles since 2018.",
    "AB 3061 will align state reporting requirements for autonomous vehicles with federal standards set by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA).",
    "AB 3061 mandates autonomous vehicle companies to disclose safety data to the DMV.",
    "The DMV is tasked with regulating autonomous vehicles and will make safety data publicly accessible.",
    "Self-driving cars have made headlines for injuring pedestrians, shutting down and blocking intersections, causing gridlock, and obstructing emergency vehicles.",
    "There is a lack of shared information as autonomous vehicles transition from testing to full deployment, which affects trust, transparency, and safety."
  ]
}
```
